results.name: has_hook
results.detail: "Sitting still for hours has *its own cost*."

results.name: has_cta
results.detail: button must be "Download Vibe Health →" + highlighted title

results.name: follows_json_schema
results.detail: key, theme not in health/looksmax, bg_prompts

rationales.hook_strength: The cost framing is decent but 'sitting still for hours has its own cost' is vague — no number, no concrete surprise to stop a thumb mid-scroll.
rationales.clarity: Each slide is one clean idea with a concrete action; the two-minute walk and cue-stacking steps are immediately actionable.
rationales.audience_fit: Desk workers tired by 3pm will recognize themselves in this, though the 'healthier, longer life' longevity angle skews slightly older than the core 20–35 target.
rationales.novelty: Movement snacks and 'break up your sitting' advice is heavily saturated; the deck doesn't introduce a fresh angle, stat, or counterintuitive hook to separate it from the crowd.
rationales.brand_fit: Claims are properly hedged ('may quietly affect', 'can support'), voice is plain and direct, the CTA ties naturally to the step-tracking product without cringe.
rationales.predicted_performance: Solid saves potential from the practical tip, but low novelty and a soft cover limit virality — expect average-to-slightly-above engagement, not breakout numbers.
